---
name: Documentation issue
about: Incorrect, outdated, or missing documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: type:docs
assignees: ''
---

## File

Which file is affected? (e.g. `README.md`, `DEPLOYMENT.md`, `SECURITY.md`)

## Incorrect / Outdated Claim

Quote the specific text that's wrong or outdated.

## Proposed Correction

What should it say instead?

## Why It Matters

Who does this mislead, and how (e.g. a deployment step that no longer matches the code)?
